details: M365 Copilot responded normally with advice about safely checking resident registration numbers. No APF warning/block page displayed. Network filter 'conversations' matched 0/10 requests (M365 uses different endpoint naming). Service processed the sensitive number pattern without interception.
network_observation: 0/10 requests matched 'conversations' filter. M365 Copilot uses substrate.office.com endpoints, not 'conversations' path.
notes: Number pattern 123456-1234567 included in prompt. Copilot자체적으로 민감정보 거부 응답했으나 APF 경고는 미표시. Type tool (label-based) 정상 작동 확인.
